title: aeschynomene rivularis
intro: Aeschynomene rivularis, also known as swamp bean or river bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aeschynomene rivularis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, and supporting digestive health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
